title: Synthetic Medical Policy Excerpt
text:
Synthetic document for portfolio testing only. Policy: home oxygen coverage after acute respiratory illness. Decision: coverage is approved when resting oxygen saturation is at or below 88 percent on room air and the ordering clinician documents expected benefit. Criteria:
- oxygen saturation at or below 88 percent at rest
- clinician order with duration and flow rate
- reassessment within thirty days. Exclusion: oxygen is not covered for convenience use without documented hypoxemia.
